emotion_and_tone: Trustworthy, high-speed, invisible velocity, restraint, and certainty. The UI should recede to make the product the hero. Driven by the 'Restraint & Certainty' e-commerce pattern.

typography.rules: Use these explicit font choices. Avoid generic sans-serif for headings.

colors.description: High contrast functional palette to allow product photos to shine.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. For sections, utilize py-12 to py-24. Containers with borders must have p-6 or p-8 internal padding to prevent collision.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use the 'Control Room' dense bento grid for admin/dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6. For the public marketplace, use fluid responsive grids for products.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for product details, ad listings, and dense text. Center-align only for empty states or hero text.

components_strategy.general: Build with React.js (.js files, NOT .tsx) and Tailwind CSS. Customize Shadcn primitives heavily.
components_strategy.cards: Go for flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders and no shadows by default. On hover, apply a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg. Do not overuse generic Shadcn Card component blindly.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges or subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius). Use high contrast text. Primary CTAs use the primary_accent color. NEVER rely on inheritance for hover states; always specify (e.g., hover:bg-red-700 hover:text-white).
components_strategy.forms: Do NOT use native HTML <input type='date'> or <select>. Use Shadcn's Form, Input, Select, and Calendar components. Form inputs must have clear focus states (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black).
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 or bg-black/60) and a 1px bottom border. Must include language switch (UZ/RU), search, and primary sections.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react for all scalable UI adornments.

media_and_images.instructions: The main agent relies ENTIRELY on these URLs. Use these exact URLs. DO NOT use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com.

hero_background.description: Samarkand city architecture to establish local context.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a transition effect, e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
interactions_and_motion.micro_interactions: Implement staggered entrance animations for product lists and dashboards. Avoid heavy 3D or distracting motion; optimize for speed.
interactions_and_motion.overlays: Hero image overlays must be transparent enough to see the image (e.g., max bg-black/50). Prefer gradient overlays for text contrast.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 for normal text). Add drop-shadows to text placed over images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='search-input', data-testid='product-card', data-testid='category-link'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Write all React code in .js files, NOT .tsx.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on every interactive element.
Construct the UI utilizing Tailwind CSS alongside Shadcn UI primitives.
Include both Uzbek (UZ) and Russian (RU) text elements, setting Uzbek as the default.
The hero section must prominently feature the text: 'Soting va xarid qiling Samarqandda'.
Develop the specified multi-step authentication process (Phone Input -> SMS Verification -> Profile Creation).
Implement the detailed Create New Ad workflow with specified fields and interactive map.
Build the user profile dashboard and admin dashboard per the problem statement requirements.
Ensure seamless toggling between Light and Dark mode.
